name: Barbell Bent-Over Row
setup: Grip bar slightly wider than shoulder-width (overhand or underhand)
Hinge at hips until torso ~45 degrees to floor
Bar hangs at knee cap level, arms extended
execution: Pull bar to lower sternum / upper abdomen
Drive elbows back, squeeze shoulder blades
Lower under control to full arm extension
Keep torso angle fixed throughout (no jerking)
common_mistakes: Torso rising with the weight (turning into upright row)
Using biceps instead of back (elbows too forward)
Pulling bar too high (to neck instead of sternum)
cues: Pull the bar to your sternum, not your chin
Drag the bar up your thighs
Squeeze a pencil between your shoulder blades
